visual.name: radialSpectrum
visual.description: RadialSpectrum is a modern radial visualization suite for Power BI offering three chart types: Radial (donut/pie), Radial Bar, and Circular (concentric ring) charts. It supports rich styling options including gradients, neon and glass effects, callout labels with leader lines, custom tooltips, drilldown, keyboard focus, high-contrast themes, and multi-selection. Ideal for KPI dashboards, progress tracking, category comparisons, and executive scorecards where a compact, visually engaging alternative to bar and pie charts is needed.
